subcodes.first_line: O favored ones of the divine beloved! The world of existence hath been afflicted with the darkness of waywardness, and darkness prevaileth in every direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سوگلی احبای الهی عالم امکان بر ظلمت ضلالته مبتلا اولوب قرانلق هر جهتچه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
